backend: XiUOS transform layer I2C device path

helper_usage_patterns.purpose: Bind the opened I2C device fd to the selected 7-bit device slave address before PrivWrite/PrivRead.
steps: Open the concrete bus_instance with PrivOpen and keep the fd in device state while the driver is active.
Create a uint16_t variable holding the chosen Device IR 7-bit I2C address.
Fill struct PrivIoctlCfg with ioctl_driver_type = I2C_TYPE and args = &i2c_addr.
Call PrivIoctl(fd, OPE_INT, &ioctl_cfg) once after open and before any PrivWrite or PrivRead.
Use the same configured fd for subsequent PrivWrite and PrivRead calls; close it during deinit or init-error cleanup.

notes: Default XiUOS I2C binding uses the transform-layer device path /dev/i2c1.
